name: Cell3D
defaultProgram:
search synth3d, filter3d, render

cell3d(volumeSize: x64)
.render3d()
.write(o0)

volumeCache._role: 3D-VOLUME ATLAS (outputTex3d). 2D RenderTexture of size volumeSize x volumeSize^2 (default 64 x 4096 = 64 stacked 64x64 z-slices). Atlas texel (x,yAtlas) maps to voxel (x, yAtlas%volumeSize, yAtlas/volumeSize). Stores 3D Worley/cell noise: colorMode 0 -> rgb=normalizedDist (mono), a=1; colorMode 1 -> r=normalizedDist, gba = cell-id color hashes (h1,h2,h3). Written by SV_Target0 of the precompute pass; consumed downstream by render/render3d/renderLit3d (raymarch). See reference 04 §8 vol0..7 / 10 §3.

geoBuffer._role: GEOMETRY/normal ATLAS (outputGeo). Same atlas layout/size as volumeCache. xyz = packed analytic normal (normalize(-gradient + 1e-6)*0.5+0.5), w = normalizedDist (the depth/field slot). Written by SV_Target1 of the precompute pass; consumed downstream for lit raymarch (render/renderLit3d). See reference 04 §8 geo buffers (xyz=normal, w=depth).

volume._comment: 3D / RENDER tier volume-write generator (reference 04 §8, 10 §3). Single MRT pass 'precompute' (drawBuffers:2) FILLS a 2D atlas RenderTexture representing a volumeSize^3 voxel volume (default 64^3 -> 64x4096). The fragment maps atlas (u,v)=fragCoord -> voxel (x, v%volumeSize, v/volumeSize), evaluates a 3D Worley/cellular distance field (3x3x3 neighborhood, metric sphere/octahedron/cube), and writes the normalized density (+ optional cell-id colors) to volumeCache (SV_Target0) and a packed analytical-gradient normal + density to geoBuffer (SV_Target1). NO raymarch here: a downstream render3d/renderLit3d raymarches volumeCache/geoBuffer into a 2D image. No input texture. PARITY: ported from WGSL — gradient epsilon is 1.0/volumeSize (the GLSL's 0.01/scale is NOT used). colorMode 0 writes mono, 1 writes cell colors. cellVariation/100 -> jitter blends the cell point between center (0.5) and the pcg3d hash. When chained after another 3D effect (noise3d().cell3d()), volumeSize is inherited (inheritsVolumeSize).
